title: Blasphemy
body:
Blasphemy adds a couple of new items and blocks into Minecraft such as:
- The Holy Bible (Right click to summon Lightning and TNT, Hit an entity to give them effects, and Hold it in your offhand and kill an entity which makes them go to heaven)
- Crucifix (As a weapon)
- Noah's Token (On right click turns weather to thunderstorm)
- Solomon's Ring (As an Ingredient)
- Manna (As a new food source)
- Sacramental Bread (As a healing item)
- Cypress Logs
- Cypress Wood
- Cypress Planks
